description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a tan or light brown cover and visible white or light gray pages. The book is open, revealing a slight curvature in the pages, which are blank and have a smooth, slightly glossy appearance. The front cover features embossed or raised lettering, giving it a tactile quality. The spine is also visible, with matching text running vertically. There are no visible illustrations or graphics on the cover, and the overall design is minimalistic and clean. The book appears sturdy and well-bound, suitable for regular handling in an urban environment.
description: A tan hardcover book with blank white pages, open to display its clean, minimalistic design and embossed cover text.
description_view_0: The book is seen from an angled side, showing the spine and the top edges of the open pages.
description_view_1: The front cover is visible, displaying embossed text and the open pages inside.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite side, highlighting the back cover and the curved, open pages.
description_view_3: The book is seen from above the open pages, showing the full spread of blank sheets and the inner binding.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is tan with vertically oriented embossed text matching the front cover. No additional decorative elements are present.
